title: 7 Best Home Security Systems in 2026: Professional Monitoring, DIY & No-Contract Options Tested
content:
# 7 Best Home Security Systems in 2026: Professional Monitoring, DIY & No-Contract Options Tested

*Affiliate disclosure: This article contains affiliate links. If you purchase through our links, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. This does not influence our recommendations.*

**Last updated: March 2, 2026**

## Quick Answer

**SimpliSafe is the best home security system in 2026** for most households, offering professional 24/7 monitoring with no long-term contracts, equipment starting at $250, and monthly plans from $9.99 — the most flexible approach to home security without sacrificing monitoring quality. For budget-conscious DIY users, **Ring Alarm Pro at $19.99/month** provides professional monitoring at the lowest recurring cost with no contract. If you want the most established professional monitoring with the deepest integration network, **ADT** remains the industry standard — but requires a 36-month contract commitment. Home security has evolved dramatically: AI-powered cameras distinguish between people, animals, and packages; Matter integration lets security devices work across ecosystems; and no-contract monitoring means you're never locked in.

### Quick Picks

- **Best Overall:** SimpliSafe — No contracts + professional monitoring from $9.99/mo + easy DIY install
- **Best Budget:** Ring Alarm Pro — $19.99/mo monitoring + Eero WiFi router built-in + Alexa native
- **Best Professional:** ADT — 150+ year track record + largest monitoring network + professional install

**Related articles:** [Best Smart Home Devices 2026](/home/best-smart-home-devices-2026) | [Best Robot Vacuums 2026](/home/best-robot-vacuums-2026) | [Best VPN Services 2026](/software/best-vpn-services-2026)

*Securing your whole home? Check our [best smart home devices](/home/best-smart-home-devices-2026) and [best robot vacuums](/home/best-robot-vacuums-2026) guides.*

---

## Comparison Table: All 7 Home Security Systems at a Glance

| Rank | System | Equipment Cost | Monthly Fee | Contract | Install | Monitoring | Best For |
|------|--------|---------------|-------------|----------|---------|------------|----------|
| #1 | SimpliSafe | From $250 | $9.99-$32.99/mo | None | DIY | 24/7 professional | Best overall |
| #2 | Ring Alarm Pro | From $199 | $19.99/mo | None | DIY | 24/7 professional | Best budget |
| #3 | ADT | From $269 | $24.99-$49.99/mo | 36 months | Professional | 24/7 professional | Best professional |
| #4 | Vivint | From $0 (financed) | $29.99-$49.99/mo | 60 months | Professional | 24/7 professional | Best smart home integration |
| #5 | Abode | From $199 | $0-$20/mo | None | DIY | Optional professional | Best self-monitoring |
| #6 | Cove | From $199 | $17.99-$27.99/mo | None | DIY | 24/7 professional | Best customer service |
| #7 | Wyze Home Monitoring | From $99 | $9.99/mo | None | DIY | 24/7 professional | Cheapest overall |

---

## Individual Reviews

### #1. SimpliSafe — Best Overall Home Security System

SimpliSafe earns the top spot by delivering the optimal balance of professional monitoring quality, pricing flexibility, and zero-contract freedom — proving you don't need to sign your life away for reliable home security.

| Spec | Detail |
|------|--------|
| Equipment Starting Price | $250.96 (Foundation Kit) |
| Monthly Plans | Standard $9.99/mo, Core $22.99/mo, Plus $32.99/mo |
| Contract | None — cancel anytime |
| Installation | DIY (peel-and-stick sensors) |
| Monitoring | 24/7 professional (COPS Monitoring) |
| Camera Integration | SimpliCam Indoor, Outdoor Pro, Video Doorbell Pro |
| Smart Home | Alexa, Google Assistant |

**Pros:**
- **No contracts with month-to-month billing** — cancel anytime without penalties, making SimpliSafe ideal for renters who move frequently and homeowners who want flexibility
- **$9.99/month Standard plan** provides 24/7 professional monitoring at half the cost of ADT's basic plan — the best monitoring value for budget-conscious buyers
- **$32.99/month Plus plan includes Intruder Intervention** (FastProtect) — dispatches a trained agent to your home within minutes of a verified alarm, a feature previously exclusive to premium services costing $50+/month
- **Peel-and-stick DIY installation** takes under 30 minutes for a complete system — no drilling, wiring, or professional installer appointments required
- **Environmental monitoring included** (smoke, CO, water leak, temperature) in all monitoring plans — protects against fire, flooding, and freezing pipes alongside intrusion detection

**Cons:**
- Camera recording requires the $32.99/month Plus plan — the $9.99 Standard plan includes monitoring but no camera footage storage
- No native Apple HomeKit or Matter support — locked to Alexa and Google Assistant for smart home integration
- Equipment design is functional but not premium — white plastic sensors won't blend into design-conscious homes as well as Ring or Abode hardware

**Who it's for:** Anyone who wants reliable professional monitoring without contract commitment. Renters, first-time homeowners, and budget-conscious families who want protection without paying $40-$50/month.

👉 [**Check Price on Amazon**](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BFDF1RWR?tag=nestdigital-20)

---

### #2. Ring Alarm Pro (2nd Gen) — Best Budget Home Security

Ring earns second place by combining home security with a built-in Eero WiFi 6 router, professional monitoring at $19.99/month with no contract, and deep Alexa integration — the most versatile security hub available.

| Spec | Detail |
|------|--------|
| Equipment Starting Price | $199.99 (8-piece kit) |
| Monthly Plan | Ring Home $19.99/mo |
| Contract | None — cancel anytime |
| Installation | DIY |
| Monitoring | 24/7 professional |
| Bonus | Built-in Eero WiFi 6 router |
| Smart Home | Alexa (native), Matter-compatible |

**Pros:**
- **Built-in Eero WiFi 6 router** replaces your existing router — one device handles both security monitoring and whole-home WiFi mesh, saving $150+ on a separate router
- **$19.99/month Ring Home plan** includes professional monitoring, video recording for unlimited Ring cameras, and person/package detection — one subscription covers everything
- **Deepest Alexa integration** of any security system — arm/disarm with voice commands, get intrusion alerts on Echo devices, view Ring cameras on Echo Show and Fire TV
- **Local backup storage** stores 24 hours of security footage locally on the device — even if internet goes down, critical events are captured
- **Largest ecosystem of compatible devices** including Ring Video Doorbell, Floodlight Cam, Stickup Cam, and third-party Z-Wave devices

**Cons:**
- Ring's privacy history includes controversies over police data sharing (opt-in only since 2024) and employee access to footage — Amazon ownership raises ongoing privacy concerns
- Video recording and person detection require the $19.99/month subscription — without it, cameras provide live view only with no cloud recording
- Limited to Alexa for voice control — no Google Assistant or Siri support, making it a poor fit for non-Amazon ecosystems

**Who it's for:** Amazon Alexa households that want security + WiFi router in one device. Families who already own Ring cameras or doorbells and want to add whole-home monitoring at the lowest monthly cost.

👉 [**Check Price on Amazon**](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09MG3XPR2?tag=nestdigital-20)

---

### #3. ADT — Best Professional Home Security

ADT's 150+ year track record, six monitoring centers, and the largest professional installation network make it the gold standard for homeowners who want maximum security with professional oversight.

| Spec | Detail |
|------|--------|
| Equipment Starting Price | $269 (basic system) |
| Monthly Plans | $24.99/mo (no cameras) to $49.99/mo (with cameras) |
| Contract | 36 months (24 months in CA) |
| Installation | Professional (included) |
| Monitoring | 24/7 professional (6 monitoring centers) |
| Smart Home | Alexa, Google Assistant, Z-Wave |
| Camera Storage | Cloud (with ADT+ plan) |

**Pros:**
- **150+ years in the security industry** with six redundant monitoring centers across the US — if one center goes down, others take over seamlessly, ensuring zero downtime in emergency response
- **Professional installation included** — a trained technician surveys your home, recommends optimal sensor placement, and installs everything correctly the first time
- **ADT branding is a proven deterrent** — a 2024 study by Rutgers University found that visible security signage reduces burglary attempts by up to 60%, and ADT is the most recognized brand
- **Insurance discount** of 5-20% on homeowners insurance from many providers — the annual savings can offset a significant portion of the monthly monitoring cost
- **Google Nest integration** provides ADT+ customers with AI-powered camera intelligence — person detection, familiar face recognition, and activity zones using Google's hardware

**Cons:**
- **36-month contract** is the longest commitment on this list — early termination fees of 75% of remaining balance make switching costly
- $24.99-$49.99/month is the highest ongoing cost — over 3 years, you'll spend $900-$1,800 in monitoring fees alone
- Professional installation means you wait 1-2 weeks for an appointment — not ideal for immediate security needs

**Who it's for:** Homeowners who want the most established, professionally monitored security system and are willing to commit to a 3-year contract for maximum peace of mind. Best for those who value professional installation and insurance discounts.

👉 [**Learn More About ADT**](https://www.adt.com/)

---

### #4. Vivint — Best Smart Home Security Integration

Vivint offers the most tightly integrated smart home + security experience: professionally installed cameras, locks, thermostats, and lighting that work together through a single panel and app with 24/7 monitoring.

| Spec | Detail |
|------|--------|
| Equipment Starting Price | $0 down (financed over 60 months) |
| Monthly Plans | $29.99-$49.99/mo |
| Contract | 60 months (with financing) |
| Installation | Professional |
| Monitoring | 24/7 professional |
| Smart Home | Alexa, Google, Z-Wave, proprietary panel |
| AI Features | Person detection, package detection, car detection |

**Pros:**
- **$0 down financing** makes the initial investment accessible — professional-grade equipment is installed at no upfront cost, with hardware payments built into the monthly fee
- **Most integrated smart home experience** — security cameras, smart locks, garage door controllers, thermostats, and lighting all managed through a single Vivint panel and app
- **AI-powered camera analytics** detect people, packages, cars, and animals — sends specific alerts ("Person at front door" vs. generic "Motion detected") reducing false alarm fatigue
- **Vivint Smart Hub** touchscreen panel serves as a complete home command center — view cameras, control locks, adjust thermostat, and manage automation from one screen
- **Professional monitoring with local police/fire dispatch** — Vivint contacts emergency services within seconds of a verified alarm

**Cons:**
- **60-month contract** is the longest in the industry — five-year commitment with significant early termination penalties ($500+)
- Total cost of ownership is the highest: $29.99-$49.99/month × 60 months = $1,800-$3,000 in monitoring plus financed equipment costs
- Proprietary equipment becomes expensive paperweights if you cancel — Vivint devices don't work with other monitoring services

**Who it's for:** Homeowners planning to stay in their home for 5+ years who want a fully integrated smart home + security system installed professionally. Best for those who want one company managing all smart home technology.

👉 [**Learn More About Vivint**](https://www.vivint.com/)

---

### #5. Abode — Best for Self-Monitoring

Abode stands alone as the best security system for users who want to self-monitor for free while retaining the option to add professional monitoring on-demand — the most flexible monitoring approach available.

| Spec | Detail |
|------|--------|
| Equipment Starting Price | $199 (Iota Gateway + sensors) |
| Monthly Plans | Free (self-monitor) or $20/mo (pro monitoring) |
| Contract | None |
| Installation | DIY |
| Monitoring | Self-monitor free, optional 24/7 professional |
| Smart Home | Alexa, Google, HomeKit, Matter, IFTTT, Z-Wave, Zigbee |

**Pros:**
- **Free self-monitoring tier** provides app alerts, automation, and smart home control at zero monthly cost — the only system on this list that functions fully without a subscription
- **On-demand professional monitoring** can be activated for specific periods (weekends, vacations, date nights) at $8/day or $20/month — pay only when you need it
- **Widest smart home compatibility** supporting Alexa, Google, HomeKit, Matter, IFTTT, Z-Wave, AND Zigbee — works with virtually every smart home device on the market
- **HomeKit and Matter support** make Abode the best security choice for Apple users — arm/disarm from Apple Home app, Siri voice control, and automation with Apple devices
- **CUE automation engine** creates sophisticated if/then rules without coding — "If door opens AND time is between 10pm-6am AND system is armed, then flash lights + send alert + record video"

**Cons:**
- Self-monitoring means YOU are responsible for calling 911 — if you're asleep, in a meeting, or phone is dead, nobody else is watching
- Camera quality and features lag behind Ring and SimpliSafe — adequate for security but not competitive for detailed footage
- Smaller brand with less customer support infrastructure than SimpliSafe, Ring, or ADT — online resources and community are limited

**Who it's for:** Tech-savvy homeowners who want maximum control over their security without monthly fees. Apple HomeKit users who need a security system that integrates natively with their ecosystem.

👉 [**Check Price on Amazon**](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B085T1S8TR?tag=nestdigital-20)

---

### #6. Cove — Best Customer Service

Cove earns sixth place for its exceptional customer support (rated highest in J.D. Power surveys), transparent pricing, and a 60-day risk-free trial that's triple the industry standard.

| Spec | Detail |
|------|--------|
| Equipment Starting Price | $199 (basic kit) |
| Monthly Plans | Basic $17.99/mo, Plus $27.99/mo |
| Contract | None — cancel anytime |
| Installation | DIY (guided by phone support) |
| Monitoring | 24/7 professional |
| Trial Period | 60 days risk-free |
| Smart Home | Alexa, Google Assistant |

**Pros:**
- **Highest-rated customer service** in the home security industry — consistently top-ranked in J.D. Power customer satisfaction surveys, with phone support agents who guide you through installation step-by-step
- **60-day risk-free trial** is the longest in the industry (most offer 30 days) — full refund on equipment and monitoring if you're not satisfied, with free return shipping
- **$17.99/month Basic plan** includes 24/7 professional monitoring, cellular backup, and crash-and-smash protection — competitive pricing without sacrificing essential features
- **Equipment lifetime warranty** replaces faulty sensors, panels, and cameras for free as long as you're a subscriber — eliminates replacement costs that other providers charge
- **Transparent pricing** with no hidden fees, activation costs, or rate increases — the price you sign up for stays the same

**Cons:**
- Smaller device ecosystem — fewer camera options and accessories compared to Ring, SimpliSafe, or ADT
- No Apple HomeKit or Matter support — limited to Alexa and Google for smart home integration
- Camera quality is standard definition on basic cameras — HD cameras require the Plus plan

**Who it's for:** First-time security system buyers who want guidance through every step and the longest trial period to ensure satisfaction. Excellent for non-technical users who value phone support over app-based troubleshooting.

👉 [**Learn More About Cove**](https://www.covesmart.com/)

---

### #7. Wyze Home Monitoring — Cheapest Complete System

Wyze delivers home security at a fraction of industry pricing: a complete system with sensors starting at $99 and professional monitoring at $9.99/month — the most affordable path to 24/7 monitored home security.

| Spec | Detail |
|------|--------|
| Equipment Starting Price | $99 (Core Kit) |
| Monthly Plan | $9.99/mo (Home Monitoring) |
| Contract | None |
| Installation | DIY |
| Monitoring | 24/7 professional (Noonlight) |
| Camera Integration | Wyze Cam v4 ($35), Doorbell Pro ($99) |
| Smart Home | Alexa, Google Assistant |

**Pros:**
- **$99 equipment + $9.99/month** is the lowest total cost of ownership for a professionally monitored system — first-year cost of $219 vs. $370+ for SimpliSafe and $570+ for ADT
- **Wyze camera ecosystem** is the most affordable quality option — Wyze Cam v4 at $35 delivers 2K resolution, color night vision, and AI person detection at 1/3 the price of Ring or SimpliSafe cameras
- **No contract** — cancel monitoring anytime and keep using the hardware for self-monitoring
- **Wyze app** controls all Wyze products (cameras, robot vacuum, smart bulbs, plugs, scales) from a single interface — the broadest affordable smart home ecosystem
- **Noonlight professional monitoring** provides 24/7 emergency dispatch — the same monitoring platform used by several major security providers

**Cons:**
- Equipment quality reflects the lower price point — sensors feel less premium than SimpliSafe or Ring, and battery life may be shorter
- Limited sensor types compared to competitors — no glass break sensor, no smoke/CO listener (though Wyze does offer standalone fire detection)
- Wyze has experienced data breaches (2019, 2022) exposing user information — security-focused buyers should weigh this history

**Who it's for:** Renters and budget-focused buyers who want professional monitoring at the absolute lowest cost. If your priority is having any professional monitoring rather than the most feature-rich system, Wyze is unbeatable on price.

👉 [**Check Price on Amazon**](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09LPTD6Y7?tag=nestdigital-20)

---

## How These Security Systems Were Chosen

These rankings synthesize testing data and expert analysis from [Security.org](https://www.security.org/home-security-systems/best/), [SafeWise](https://www.safewise.com/home-security-systems/best/), [U.S. News](https://realestate.usnews.com/home-services/home-security-systems), [CNET](https://www.cnet.com/home/security/best-home-security-systems/), [PCMag](https://www.pcmag.com/picks/the-best-smart-home-security-systems), and J.D. Power customer satisfaction surveys, along with verified customer reviews from Amazon, Trustpilot, and Reddit (r/homesecurity, r/simplisafe, r/Ring).

**Selection criteria weighted for 2026 use:**

1. **Monitoring quality (25%)** — Response time, monitoring center redundancy, cellular backup, and crash-and-smash protection
2. **Value for money (25%)** — Equipment cost + monthly fees over 1-year and 3-year periods, factoring in contract obligations
3. **Flexibility (20%)** — Contract terms, self-monitoring options, portability, and ability to cancel without penalties
4. **Equipment & features (15%)** — Sensor quality, camera resolution, AI detection, environmental monitoring
5. **Smart home integration (10%)** — Alexa, Google, HomeKit, Matter support, and automation capabilities
6. **Customer support (5%)** — J.D. Power rankings, response times, and installation guidance quality

---

## Buyer's Guide: Home Security in 2026

### Professional vs Self-Monitoring
Professional monitoring (SimpliSafe, Ring, ADT) means a monitoring center contacts emergency services when your alarm triggers. Self-monitoring (Abode free tier, any system without subscription) sends alerts to your phone — you decide whether to call 911. Professional monitoring costs $10-$50/month but provides 24/7 coverage even when you're sleeping, in meetings, or out of cell range.

### Contract vs No-Contract
ADT and Vivint require 36-60 month contracts with early termination fees. SimpliSafe, Ring, Abode, Cove, and Wyze are month-to-month. Our recommendation: avoid contracts unless the provider offers significant equipment discounts that justify the commitment. The flexibility of no-contract monitoring is worth a small premium.

### DIY vs Professional Installation
DIY systems (SimpliSafe, Ring, Abode, Cove, Wyze) install in 30-60 minutes with peel-and-stick sensors. Professional installation (ADT, Vivint) sends a trained technician to survey your home and install hardwired sensors. DIY is faster, cheaper, and portable; professional installation is more thorough but locks you into an appointment and potentially a contract.

### Hidden Costs to Watch For
Beware: activation fees ($50-$200), equipment installation charges ($100-$300), camera storage add-ons ($5-$10/device/month), cellular backup fees ($5-$10/month), and rate increases after promotional periods. SimpliSafe and Wyze are the most transparent; ADT and Vivint often have the most hidden costs.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is the best home security system in 2026?
**SimpliSafe is the best home security system in 2026** for most households, offering professional 24/7 monitoring with no contracts, equipment from $250, and plans from $9.99/month. For budget buyers, Wyze offers monitoring from $99 equipment + $9.99/month. For professional-grade security, ADT remains the industry standard.

### Is professional monitoring worth it?
For most households, yes. Professional monitoring ensures emergency dispatch even when you're asleep, at work, or unreachable. At $10-$20/month, it's the cost of two streaming subscriptions for 24/7 security coverage. Self-monitoring is viable for tech-savvy users who are always reachable, but professional monitoring provides irreplaceable peace of mind.

### Can I install a security system myself?
Yes — SimpliSafe, Ring, Abode, Cove, and Wyze are all designed for DIY installation using peel-and-stick adhesive sensors and wireless cameras. Average installation time is 30-60 minutes. No drilling, wiring, or technical expertise required. Instructions are straightforward and phone support is available during setup.

### Do security systems actually prevent break-ins?
Yes. A 2024 Rutgers University study found that homes with visible security systems experience 60% fewer burglary attempts. The University of North Carolina found that 60% of convicted burglars said they'd choose a different target upon discovering an alarm system. The deterrent effect is significant and well-documented.

### Ring vs SimpliSafe: which is better?
SimpliSafe offers lower monitoring costs ($9.99 vs $19.99/month) and more plan flexibility. Ring offers better value if you already own Ring cameras (one subscription covers all devices) and want the built-in WiFi router. SimpliSafe wins on monitoring cost; Ring wins on ecosystem integration with Alexa.

### How much does a home security system cost per month?
Monthly monitoring ranges from $9.99 (SimpliSafe Standard, Wyze) to $49.99 (ADT with cameras, Vivint). Most households spend $15-$25/month for professional monitoring with camera recording. No-contract options from SimpliSafe, Ring, Cove, and Wyze provide the best flexibility.

### Do security cameras work without WiFi?
Most modern security cameras require WiFi for cloud recording and remote viewing. However, cameras with local storage (Ring Alarm Pro, some Wyze cameras) can record footage locally during internet outages. Professional monitoring through cellular backup (included with SimpliSafe, Ring, ADT) continues working without WiFi.

### Are smart locks compatible with security systems?
Yes — most security systems (SimpliSafe, Ring, ADT, Vivint, Abode) integrate with smart locks from August, Yale, Schlage, and others. Through automation, your system can auto-lock doors when armed, unlock for emergency responders, and alert you to unlocked doors. Look for Z-Wave or Matter compatibility for the widest lock options.

---

## Conclusion: Our Top Pick for 2026

After evaluating monitoring quality, pricing, contract terms, and smart home integration across all major providers, **SimpliSafe is the best home security system for most households in 2026**.

Ring offers a better router-security combo, ADT offers deeper professional infrastructure, and Wyze is cheaper. But no other system matches SimpliSafe's **combination** of monitoring quality, pricing flexibility, and zero-contract freedom.

**Here's the decision simplified:**

- **Want the best balance?** → Get [SimpliSafe](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BFDF1RWR?tag=nestdigital-20) — no contract, from $9.99/mo
- **Want cheapest monitoring?** → Get [Ring Alarm Pro](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09MG3XPR2?tag=nestdigital-20) — built-in router + $19.99/mo
- **Want proven professional?** → Get [ADT](https://www.adt.com/) — 150+ year track record
- **Want full smart home?** → Get [Vivint](https://www.vivint.com/) — cameras, locks, thermostat, lighting
- **Want free monitoring?** → Get [Abode](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B085T1S8TR?tag=nestdigital-20) — self-monitor free + HomeKit
- **Want best support?** → Get [Cove](https://www.covesmart.com/) — 60-day trial + lifetime warranty
- **On a tight budget?** → Get [Wyze](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09LPTD6Y7?tag=nestdigital-20) — $99 equipment + $9.99/mo

Home security in 2026 is more accessible and flexible than ever. You no longer need a multi-year contract or thousands in equipment costs to protect your family — reliable professional monitoring starts at $10/month with no strings attached.

---

*Last updated: March 2, 2026. Prices reflect current MSRP and monitoring rates. Monitoring quality data sourced from Security.org, SafeWise, U.S. News, and J.D. Power surveys. Contract terms and pricing verified against manufacturer websites.*
